About the role

We're hiring a Senior Software Engineer to build the next generation of our data platform. You'll work in a fast-paced team using TypeScript, Postgres, and AWS.

Requirements

  • 5+ years of experience writing production TypeScript or JavaScript
  • Deep familiarity with relational databases (Postgres preferred)
  • Comfortable with cloud deployment on AWS or GCP
  • Excellent written communication

Benefits

  • 401(k) with company match
  • Comprehensive health, dental, vision insurance
  • Unlimited PTO
  • Remote-first culture
